restaurant_openings.name: Alonetogether
restaurant_openings.summary: A 35-seat Haitian, French, and Creole restaurant from Chef Jonny Rhodes featuring live-fire cooking and a chef-driven non-alcoholic bar program. The menu includes globally inspired flavors and a seafood platter inspired by Gonave Island.

restaurant_openings.name: Cuevacía
restaurant_openings.summary: A Oaxacan-inspired restaurant located in Colony Square featuring curved booths, succulents, and a tall wooden door. The menu offers smoked jalapeño margaritas, pink Paraiso cocktails, and shared desserts like churros with dipping sauces.

restaurant_openings.name: LikeMinds
restaurant_openings.summary: LikeMinds takes over the enormous space left behind by Brewdog on the Beltline. The pop-up sports bar features a curated selection of beers and classic bar food.

restaurant_openings.name: El Tesoro South Downtown
restaurant_openings.summary: El Tesoro is expanding their taco empire with a third location in South Downtown. It features their signature favorites including a variety of tacos and regional Mexican specialties.

restaurant_openings.name: Brewhouse Cafe Downtown
restaurant_openings.summary: Brewhouse has been the premier soccer bar in Atlanta since 1997. Their new downtown location continues the tradition of hosting Atlanta United fans and international soccer supporters.

restaurant_openings.name: La Cueva
restaurant_openings.summary: With a suave cave entrance like a red rock grotto, La Cueva is a new Mexican speakeasy and restaurant. It offers a unique atmosphere for dining and specialty cocktails in the Old Fourth Ward.
restaurant_openings.venue_or_address: 675 PONCE DE LEON AVE NE, ATLANTA, GEORGIA 30308

restaurant_openings.name: The Irish Exit
restaurant_openings.summary: The Irish Exit comes from the team behind NYC's renowned Dead Rabbit. It brings an authentic Irish pub experience to Centennial Olympic Park with a focus on high-quality spirits and service.
restaurant_openings.venue_or_address: 85 CENTENNIAL OLYMPIC PARK DR NW, ATLANTA, GEORGIA 30303

restaurant_openings.name: Nando's Peri Peri Krog
restaurant_openings.summary: Nando's opened their first Georgia location in Dunwoody and has now expanded to Krog Street. They are known for their signature flame-grilled peri-peri chicken.

restaurant_openings.name: CTR Food Works
restaurant_openings.summary: Joining the growing wave of restaurants and bars opening in the area, CTR Food Works offers a new dining destination for those visiting the Marietta Street area.

restaurant_openings.name: Cosm Atlanta
restaurant_openings.summary: Cosm Atlanta sits downtown near Centennial Olympic Park and features three distinct sections with different vibes. It offers a giant event space for watching live sports and entertainment.
restaurant_openings.venue_or_address: 85 CENTENNIAL OLYMPIC PARK DR NW, ATLANTA, GEORGIA 30313

restaurant_openings.name: Terminal 26
restaurant_openings.summary: Terminal 26 is a new addition to the Ponce City Market area offering a variety of food options for visitors. It joins a lineup of diverse culinary concepts in the Old Fourth Ward.
restaurant_openings.venue_or_address: 675 PONCE DE LEON AVE NE, ATLANTA, GEORGIA 30308

restaurant_openings.name: Pink Lotus
restaurant_openings.summary: Pink Lotus is a new Vietnamese concept located in the Old Fourth Ward. It brings traditional flavors and modern presentation to the bustling Ponce City Market neighborhood.
restaurant_openings.venue_or_address: 675 PONCE DE LEON AVE NE, ATLANTA, GEORGIA 30308

restaurant_openings.name: Alonetogether
restaurant_openings.summary: This Haitian brasserie has a tidy menu of steak and seafood options and a soup joumou that's a standout. It brings authentic Caribbean flavors to Midtown Atlanta.
restaurant_openings.venue_or_address: 1270 W PEACHTREE ST NW, ATLANTA, GEORGIA 30309

restaurant_openings.name: Bless Your Heart
restaurant_openings.summary: Bless Your Heart is a rooftop bar at the Hotel Phoenix that offers views of Centennial Olympic Park. It serves as a new social spot for drinks and snacks downtown.
restaurant_openings.venue_or_address: 70 CENTENNIAL OLYMPIC PARK DR NW, ATLANTA, GEORGIA 30313

restaurant_openings.name: Zephyr Southern Brasserie
restaurant_openings.summary: Zephyr Southern Brasserie adds a refined Southern dining option to the Hotel Phoenix. It features a menu focused on regional ingredients and classic brasserie techniques.
restaurant_openings.venue_or_address: 70 CENTENNIAL OLYMPIC PARK DR NW, ATLANTA, GEORGIA 30313

restaurant_openings.name: Black Pizza
restaurant_openings.summary: Black Pizza in Bankhead sells whole pies, slices, and wings. They offer a ton of combos that include affordable options for the neighborhood.
restaurant_openings.venue_or_address: 2079 JOSEPH E BOONE BLVD NW, ATLANTA, GEORGIA 30314

restaurant_openings.name: Pie Bar
restaurant_openings.summary: Pie Bar is exactly what it sounds like: a place where you can get a slice or a whole pie. They offer a variety of sweet and savory options in West Midtown.
restaurant_openings.venue_or_address: 1530 ELLSWORTH INDUSTRIAL BLVD NW, ATLANTA, GEORGIA 30318

events_calendar.name: FIFA SOCCER CITY WORLD CUP EXPERIENCE
events_calendar.summary: Immerse yourself in the World Cup experience at the Londzell Performing Arts Theatre. This event features soccer-themed activities and viewing opportunities.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Londzell Performing Arts Theatre, Tucker, GA

events_calendar.name: The Grown Folks Field Day: Games, Grilling & Genuine Connection (35+)
events_calendar.summary: A field day designed for adults 35 and older, featuring games, grilling, and a chance for genuine connection in Atlanta.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Atlanta, GA

events_calendar.name: On the Record- Black Men, Mental Health and Vulnerability
events_calendar.summary: A discussion event at Warehouse Studios focused on mental health and vulnerability among Black men.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Warehouse Studios, Atlanta, GA

events_calendar.name: Tours: Truist Park
events_calendar.summary: Take a guided tour of Truist Park, home of the Atlanta Braves, and see behind-the-scenes areas of the stadium.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Truist Park, Atlanta, GA

events_calendar.name: Luau Island Selfie Experience
events_calendar.summary: A tropical-themed selfie experience at the Selfie Paradise Museum with various photo opportunities.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Selfie Paradise Museum, Douglasville, GA

events_calendar.name: Struggle Jennings
events_calendar.summary: Musical performance by Struggle Jennings at Vinyl in Atlanta.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Vinyl, Atlanta, GA

events_calendar.name: Great Ant Sleepover
events_calendar.summary: A family-friendly event at the Alliance Theatre featuring the 'Great Ant Sleepover'.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Alliance Theatre, Atlanta, GA

events_calendar.name: Rockdale Eats a Rainbow
events_calendar.summary: A community event in Conyers focused on healthy eating and colorful foods.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Conyers, GA

events_calendar.name: Celebration Park Ribbon Cutting
events_calendar.summary: Official ribbon-cutting ceremony for the opening of Celebration Park in Conyers.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Conyers, GA

events_calendar.name: Open Mic Night
events_calendar.summary: Comedy open mic night at the Laughing Skull Lounge in Atlanta.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Laughing Skull Lounge, Atlanta, GA

events_calendar.name: Kick It In The District Watch Party: Gocha's Tapas Bar
events_calendar.summary: Watch party for soccer fans at Gocha's Tapas Bar as part of the Kick It In The District series.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Gocha's Tapas Bar, Atlanta, GA

events_calendar.name: Official 50th Birthday Celebration
events_calendar.summary: The Chattahoochee Nature Center celebrates its 50th birthday with special events and activities.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Chattahoochee Nature Center, Roswell, GA

events_calendar.name: Dinosaur Handprint Cards - Take and Make
events_calendar.summary: A children's craft event where participants can make dinosaur handprint cards at the Cleveland Avenue Branch Library.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Cleveland Avenue Branch Library, Atlanta, GA

events_calendar.name: Dog in Human Costume
events_calendar.summary: A fun and quirky event at MadLife Stage & Studios featuring dogs in human costumes.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: MadLife Stage & Studios, Woodstock, GA

events_calendar.name: College Park Welcomes the World Watch Party
events_calendar.summary: Community watch party at Badgett Stadium welcoming the world for international soccer events.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Badgett Stadium, College Park, GA

events_calendar.name: Discover ATL Hop & Ride
events_calendar.summary: Experience the free cultural shuttle in Atlanta featuring soccer-themed special events through the summer of 2026. This monthly event offers a unique way to explore Atlanta neighborhoods during the World Cup season.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Atlanta Neighborhoods, 233 Peachtree Rd NE, Suite 1400, Atlanta, GA 30303

events_calendar.name: All the Soccer Things at The Works
events_calendar.summary: Enjoy a family-friendly celebration of soccer at The Works featuring watch parties and activities for all ages. The event runs daily throughout the summer soccer season in the Upper Westside.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: The Works, 1295 Chattahoochee Ave NW, Atlanta, GA 30318

events_calendar.name: Soccer Watch Party at Round Trip
events_calendar.summary: Join fellow fans for soccer watch parties at Round Trip Brewing Company in East Cobb. Experience the match day atmosphere with local craft beer and community viewing events.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Round Trip Brewing Co. - East Cobb, 4475 Roswell Road, Suire 1600, Marietta, GA 30062

events_calendar.name: Kick It In The District : Nouveau Bar & Grill
events_calendar.summary: Visit Nouveau Bar & Grill in College Park for a sports-focused community gathering. This free event brings fans together for an evening of entertainment and athletic celebration.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Nouveau Bar & Grill, 3775 Main Street, College Park, GA 30337

events_calendar.name: Motion at MJQ
events_calendar.summary: Experience the energy of Atlanta nightlife at the iconic MJQ Concourse. This late-night event features local DJs and a vibrant dance floor atmosphere in the heart of the city.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: MJQ, 50 Upper Alabama St, Atlanta, GA 30303

events_calendar.name: TIO LUCHO’S CELEBRATES FOUR YEARS
events_calendar.summary: Celebrate the four-year anniversary of Tio Lucho's with special menu items and dining experiences. This Peruvian-inspired restaurant honors its milestone with three days of festivities in Virginia-Highland.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Tio Lucho's, 675 N. Highland Avenue, Atlanta, GA 30306

events_calendar.name: Drag Bingo
events_calendar.summary: Participate in a lively evening of bingo hosted by local drag performers at Schoolhouse Brewing. This recurring event combines competitive gaming with high-energy entertainment and local brews.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Schoolhouse Brewing, 840 Franklin Court, Suite 100, Marietta, GA 30067

events_calendar.name: The Dynamic! – Funny scenes, songs and games!
events_calendar.summary: Experience a night of improv comedy featuring funny scenes, original songs, and interactive games. This high-energy show at Dynamic El Dorado showcases Atlanta's top improvisational talent.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Dynamic El Dorado, 572 Edgewood Ave, Suite 116, Atlanta, GA 30312

events_calendar.name: Match Day Watch Parties at Fairway Social
events_calendar.summary: Fairway Social hosts premier match day watch parties for soccer enthusiasts in Alpharetta. Enjoy the game on large screens with food, drinks, and a social atmosphere designed for sports fans.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Fairway Social, 240 South Main St, Alpharetta, GA 30009

events_calendar.name: Showdown Social Alpharetta Watch Parties
events_calendar.summary: Join the crowd at Showdown Social for summer soccer watch parties. This venue serves as a hub for fans to gather and support their teams throughout the international tournament season.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Showdown Social, 7955 North Point Pkwy, Alpharetta, GA 30022

events_calendar.name: Atlanta Ice Cream Festival
events_calendar.summary: Cool off at Piedmont Park with the annual Atlanta Ice Cream Festival. This family-oriented event features ice cream vendors, live music, and activities for children in one of the city's premier parks.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Charles Allen Gate at Piedmont Park, 1000 Charles Allen Dr NE, Atlanta, GA 30309

events_calendar.name: T Rex: The Ultimate Predator
events_calendar.summary: Discover the world of the most famous dinosaur at Fernbank Museum's immersive exhibit. This educational experience explores the biology and behavior of the T. rex through fossils and interactive displays.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Fernbank Museum of Natural History, 767 Clifton Rd NE, Atlanta, GA 30307

events_calendar.name: Soccer Fest
events_calendar.summary: Celebrate the spirit of the game at Soccer Fest in Castleberry Hill. This recurring community festival features sports activities, food, and music for residents and visitors alike.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: The Commons at Castleberry Hill, 443 Nelson St SW, Suite 1600, Atlanta, GA 30323

events_calendar.name: Prime Fan Zone Experience
events_calendar.summary: Experience the ultimate fan zone at F1 Arcade Atlanta during the soccer season. This event provides a high-tech environment for watching matches and enjoying racing-themed entertainment.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: F1 Arcade Atlanta, 1154 Howell Mill Rd NW, Suite G205, Atlanta, GA 30318

events_calendar.name: Alif Institute WC Watch Party: Morocco vs Haiti
events_calendar.summary: Join the Alif Institute for a community watch party featuring the match between Morocco and Haiti. This cultural event offers a welcoming space for soccer fans to enjoy international competition together.
events_calendar.venue_or_address: Alif Institute, 3288 Marjan Drive, Atlanta, GA 30340
